name: chain__most_dropshippers_find_a_winning_produc
method: most dropshippers find a winning product and have no idea where their competitor actually sources it.they’re stuck on aliexpress paying $12 for something that costs $3 at the factory.here’s the play:

stages.task: Scrape ImportYeti (free, no login), USA Trade Online, Volza free results for HS codes matching trending product categories
Cross-reference customs shipment consignees with AliExpress top sellers to identify which factories supply which storefronts
Generate niche supplier intelligence reports (factory name, location, volume, pricing estimate, MOQ) formatted as sellable PDFs
Create Gumroad/Whop listings, generate 3 tweets + 1 thread about customs data hack, cold email dropshipper communities
